description_long: This object consists of two circular bands adorned with numerous small, delicate artificial flowers in soft pastel shades of pink, white, and peach. The bands themselves appear to be made of a flexible, white material, possibly fabric or plastic, providing a base for the floral decorations. The flowers are densely packed, creating a lush, textured appearance that gives the bands a romantic and whimsical feel. Each flower is detailed with subtle color gradients and petal shapes, enhancing the naturalistic effect. The overall design is lightweight and airy, suitable for decorative wear. The bands are likely intended to be worn as bracelets or hair accessories, adding a touch of floral elegance to the wearer.
description: Two circular bands covered in pastel artificial flowers, creating a soft, romantic, and textured appearance. The bands are white and flexible, with densely packed floral decorations.
description_view_0: Two intertwined floral bands with visible pastel flowers and white bases, showing the open circular form.
description_view_1: Bands viewed from the side, highlighting the thickness of the floral arrangement and the white inner structure.
description_view_2: Bands seen from the opposite side, emphasizing the continuity of the floral covering and the soft color transitions.
description_view_3: Bands viewed from above, showing the circular shape and dense floral coverage with a focus on the topmost flowers.
